title: El crucifijo de piedra
writer: Mario García Camberos, Paulino Masip, Alfonso Rosas Priego
actors: Rosa Elena Durgel, Fernando Casanova, Sara García
plot: A young prostitue woman arrives severely injured to a hospital and finds a chance to have a new life when the grandmother of another woman who has just died there mistakenly takes her as her grandaugther and takes her to live with...
